summary.para: Floating point number used to decrease or increase the relevance scores of the query. Boost values are relative to the default value of 1.0. A boost value between 0 and 1.0 decreases the relevance score. A value greater than 1.0 increases the relevance score.
The name of the vector field to search against
Filters for the kNN search query
The final number of nearest neighbors to return as top hits
The number of nearest neighbor candidates to consider per shard
The query vector builder. You must provide a query_vector_builder or query_vector, but not both.
Apply oversampling and rescoring to quantized vectors *
The minimum similarity for a vector to be considered a match
